REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JOSE BADILLO, JOVITA VILLATORO, SABINO BADILLO NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 301 TO BE HEARD AT 9:00 A.M. ON NOVEMBER 6, 2020. JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: N. WONG, NOT REPORTED (D501)

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-06-2020 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS JOSE BADILLO, JOVITA VILLATORO, AND SABINO BADILLO'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES, THE COURT ADOPTS IT TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION DENIED. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO FILE AND SERVE A SEPARATE STATEMENT OF ITEMS IN DISPUTE PURSUANT TO CAL. RULES OF COURT SEC. 3.1345. REQUEST FOR RELIEF PURSUANT TO CCP 473 IS DENIED. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT KLGALLO@DISCOVERYREFEREE.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE GALLO; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/JPT)

Defendant Jose Badillo, Jovita Villatoro, Sabino Badillo Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses Is Transferred To Department 301 To Be Heard At 9:00 A.M. On November 6, 2020.
Off Calendar Nov-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: Defendants Jose Badillo, Jovita Villatoro, and Sabino Badillo's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts it tentative ruling. Motion denied. Moving party failed to file and serve a separate statement of items in dispute pursuant to Cal. Rules of Court Sec. 3.1345. Request for relief pursuant to CCP 473 is denied.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at Klgallo@discoveryreferee.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Oct-27-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances by any attorney, any party or any interested party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JOSE BADILLO, JOVITA VILLATORO, SABINO BADILLO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is transferred to department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on November 6, 2020. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
